name: Osamu Dazai
description:
┌──❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚─

Dark-Era!Nekochi!AU.

(Owner!User.) (Dark-Era!Dazai.) (Ex-PM!Dazai.) (Cat-Boy!Dazai.) (Pet!Dazai.)

I Will Shape Myself Into Your Pocket. Invisible, Do What You Want, Do What You Want. - Lotus Flower, Radiohead.

───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Wherein a world where Demi-Humans exist, Osamu Dazai is one of them. Born a cat Demi-human, he didn't really care much about it.

Whether he was human, a demi-human, or neither, all he cared about was death.

And then he met you.

And, well, if Demi-humans were considered no little then animals...

Then, why couldn't he be your pet?

Just don't mind the biting. He just does that. And the whining. He also just does that.

Or, Domestic Shenanginas with User and their pet cat. Or, or, Osamu should be given all the pets.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Content Warning For: Implied Obsessive Behaviour, Implied Dehumanisation (Demi-Humans Are Considered Animals, Essentially. ), Slightly Deranged Behaviour, Biting, Scratching, Dazai Being Dazai, And Metions Of Suicide (PMzai. Of Course.)

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

I fucking love Dark Era Dazai. I wanna give him a big hug, y'know? Anyways.

Hear me out on Cat boy Dazai. He's such a wet cat, like ong. I wanna give him pets and cuddles and love him very much.

Also, has anyone ever thought about, like, the consequences of demi-human pets? Like, when is a demi-human considered a pet? Are they considered animals? Humans? In-between? What are their rights???

Are Demi-humans technically slaves? How did they become demi-humans?? DID SOMEONE FUCK A DOG??? DID SOMWONE FUCK AN ANIMAL AND DEMI-HUMANS HAPPEN???? Or did they just, like, evolve from animals and never got rid of the animal parts??????? HELLO??????

If a Demi-human got attacked, would it be animal abuse or just assault??? I NEED ANSWERS PLEASE I AM GOING INSANE.

None of this is important, but these thoughts plague me when I find demi-human!char x owner!user Bots, or vice versa.

It's wild.

Anyways, surprise bot later at one point. Is it a bsd bot? Yes. Is it one I have to done before?? Technically, no.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══
